name: delay-hold-blocking-archive
description: DelayHoldApplied=True from recently removed policy blocks MFA archiving

commands.command: Get-Mailbox -Identity alex.chen@contoso.com | Format-List ArchiveStatus, ArchiveState, RetentionPolicy, AutoExpandingArchiveEnabled, InPlaceHolds, DelayHoldApplied, LitigationHoldEnabled, ComplianceTagHoldApplied

ArchiveState                 : Local
RetentionPolicy              : Default MRM Policy

DelayHoldApplied             : True
LitigationHoldEnabled        : False
ComplianceTagHoldApplied     : False

FolderSize            : 15.8 GB (16,966,615,040 bytes)
ItemsInFolder         : 44,102
FolderType            : RecoverableItems

Name                  : SubstrateHolds
FolderSize            : 15.2 GB (16,321,839,104 bytes)
ItemsInFolder         : 42,891
FolderType            : RecoverableItems

DisplayName       : In-Place Archive - Alex Chen
ItemCount         : 245
TotalItemSize     : 1.8 GB (1,932,735,283 bytes)

RetentionAction         : MoveToArchive
AgeLimitForRetention    : 730.00:00:00
RetentionEnabled        : True
